title: Cf527Dg9Mqfbwf42Pjrynzrlll1Pvl
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The world is almost spoilt for choice, with two vaccines showing great potential with the initial findings. Pfizer's first announcement sent equities and oil soaring, but with sentiments cooling considerably fairly quickly as reality set in. Moderna subsequently published even stronger test statistics on their vaccine, only to be outdone by Pfizer's second batch of test data.
